division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: A legal owner may assign his title or interest in or to a vehicle registered under this code to a person other than the owner without the consent of and without affecting the interest of the owner.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 2. Transfers of Title or Interest [5600 - 6105]
#### Article 1. Procedure to Transfer [5600 - 5604.5]
##### § 5603

A legal owner may assign his title or interest in or to a vehicle registered under this code to a person other than the owner without the consent of and without affecting the interest of the owner.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: A legal owner may assign his title or interest in or to a vehicle registered under this code to a person other than the owner without the consent of and without affecting the interest of the owner.
